alkylation concentration: alkylated using 10 mM methyl methanethiosulfonate for 30 min at 25°C
cleavage agent: Proteins were digested with trypsin (Pierce MS grade Trypsin, Thermo Fisher Scientific)
fragmentation method: fragmented by collision induced dissociation at 35%
instrument: analyzed on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid mass spectrometer
labeling: peptides were labeled using TMT10plex isobaric label reagents
reduction reagent: reduced in 100 mM DL-dithiothreitol at 60°C for 30 min
reduction concentration: reduced in 100 mM DL-dithiothreitol at 60°C for 30 min
